name: Savory Spinach Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread crumbs, melted butter, and grated Parmesan in an 8-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes until lightly browned.
2. Remove from oven; lower temperature to 300 degrees.
3. In a skillet, sauté onion until translucent. Add mushrooms and cook until they sweat. Cool.
4. Cream cheese, eggs, nutmeg, light cream, and beer together until light and fluffy.
5. Steam, drain, and chop spinach coarsely. Squeeze excess liquid into paper towels.
6. Carefully fold the mushroom mixture and chopped spinach into the cheese mixture.
7. Pour into prepared crust and bake for 1 1/2 hours.
8. Turn off oven; set door slightly ajar; allow cake to cool in oven for 2 hours before refrigerating for at least 3 hours before serving.
